name: Navigateurs
description: Navigateurs alternatifs a Firefox (deja installe sur Nobara)

external.name: Brave Browser
external.description: Navigateur Brave axe vie privee (depot officiel)
external.cmd: sudo bash -c 'dnf install -y dnf-plugins-core && dnf config-manager --add-repo https://brave-browser-rpm-release.s3.brave.com/brave-browser.repo && rpm --import https://brave-browser-rpm-release.s3.brave.com/brave-core.asc && dnf install -y brave-browser'
